caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio against a dark grey, sound-absorbing acoustic foam wall. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small black logo on the chest that reads "Stay Humble". He is positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone mounted on a silver boom arm. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as he talks. In the first few frames, he looks slightly to the side and begins to speak, then shifts his gaze toward the microphone in the final frame. His expression remains relatively neutral as he engages in the conversation. The camera remains stationary, focusing on a medium close-up of the man and the recording equipment.
